items.claim: Bernson Rivero is not a good fighter and overall performs poorly in the UFC.
Maggamed Chuchabs likes to strike, keep the fight standing, and apply pressure to his opponent.
items.quote: a guy that pretty much ultimately likes to strike and um likes to keep the fight a stand and bang and puts pressure into his opponent.

items.claim: Mamed is inexperienced with a record of only 6 and 0.
items.quote: Mamed is only 6 and0 so very inexperienced.

items.claim: Maggamed Chuchabs has great power in his hands and striking that is arguably better than Bernson Roberio's.
items.quote: the dude has power in his hands. The dude has great striking and it's, you know, arguably better than Brenson Roberio.

items.claim: Maggamed Chuchabs will knock out Bernson Rivero within the first two rounds.
items.quote: Maggamemed Chuchabs is just pretty much coming here and knock out Brenson uh Brenson Rivero within the first two.
